testcase.name: test_patch_updates_soft_fields_and_persists

failure.message: AssertionError: PATCH response mismatch on profile_photo_url: got None want https://ex.com/pic-1ae388ae.jpg assert None == 'https://ex.com/pic-1ae388ae.jpg' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf93848085400>('profile_photo_url') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf93848085400> = {'about_me': 'About-1ae388ae', 'address': 'Addr-1ae388ae', 'blood_group': 'O+', 'city': 'Bangalore', ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter25_profile_editing.py:104: in test_patch_updates_soft_fields_and_persists assert data.get(k) == v, f"PATCH response mismatch on {k}: got {data.get(k)} want {v}" E AssertionError: PATCH response mismatch on profile_photo_url: got None want https://ex.com/pic-1ae388ae.jpg E assert None == 'https://ex.com/pic-1ae388ae.jpg' E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf93848085400>('profile_photo_url') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf93848085400> = {'about_me': 'About-1ae388ae', 'address': 'Addr-1ae388ae', 'blood_group': 'O+', 'city': 'Bangalore', ...}.get

testcase.name: test_reject_mobile_in_use

skipped.message: Duplicate-user dup test requires another live user account; covered manually.
